insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure compatibility with future versions.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and block_progress capability. They should also test their extensions with the latest API version to ensure compatibility. The deprecation does not affect existing extensions immediately, but it is essential to update them to avoid breaking changes in the future. Developers can use alternative APIs or hooks to achieve similar functionality.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with checkout UI extensions if they are not updated to remove the deprecated API. However, existing extensions will continue to work on older versions, minimizing the immediate impact on merchants.
insight.why_it_matters: The deprecation of the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API is essential for maintaining compatibility with future API versions and ensuring a smooth checkout experience for merchants and their customers. It also encourages developers to update their extensions to use more modern and efficient APIs.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, starting from API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more flexibly, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, ensuring that existing workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, including updates to App Update and GCS bundle upload validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and related Checkout types will be removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting from API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting from version 2026-07.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS extensions, app pricing, and more

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI Updates
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. These updates enable more flexible and powerful extensions for merchants.

themes.title: App Development and Pricing
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, Shopify Flow has introduced changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes.

themes.title: Security and Compliance
themes.detail: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, and the App Store Requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices. The Customer Account API has also removed deprecated fields, effective 2026-10.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and comply with updated App Store Requirements policy 1.3
Migrate from deprecated Customer Account API fields before 2026-10
